metadata.description: Astra marketplace for Claude Code: lead-guided engineering workflow (`crew`), spec-driven agentic dev engine (`runner`), and AstraMemory bridge (`memory`). Central registry — plugins live in their own repos.

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Dispatcher-guided engineering workflow plugin for Claude Code with bounded subagents, parallel quality gates, and inspectable handoffs

plugins.name: runner
plugins.description: Spec-driven agentic development engine for Claude Code: free-text intake, PM-triaged backlog, slice-scoped specs with Given-When-Then acceptance criteria, parallel-worktree wave dispatch, automated phase-gate quality + review + validation, and decision-grade retros. Built for fast, audited, regression-resistant code delivery at scale.

plugins.name: memory
plugins.description: Slash commands (/recall, /remember) + auto-capture hooks + astramem CLI provider selector (local vs SaaS) + MCP tools (search_memory, recall_memory, remember, get_health). Bun-native TypeScript.
